title: Assassin's Pride
sourceNotes: LN-based; ranges are by NOVEL VOLUME (not chapters) of Kei Amagi's "Assassin's Pride" light novel (AniList id 99350; 13-volume main series complete in 2021, plus 2 "Secret Garden" side-story volumes). The single 12-episode 2019 anime adapts roughly volumes 1-5 but NON-SEQUENTIALLY and loosely: eps 1-3 = Vol 1 (Melida gains mana under tutor Kufa), eps 4-6 = Vol 2 (the Luna Lumiere / "Queen Selection Battle" tournament with twins Mule & Salacha), eps 7-9 = Vol 5 ("The Abyssal Feast" detour), eps 10-12 = Vol 3 ("Court of Fate" / Labyrinth Library, Mule & Salacha return). Volume 4 ("Sakura Revolt Railway") is skipped entirely; adaptation guides recommend readers resume at Vol 6. Chapters[] therefore encode volume numbers, and the sequence is intentionally out of numeric order to follow episode progression. Vols 6-13 are unadapted.
